description: RAPP Agent Registry — machine-readable API for autonomous agents. No server. No auth for reads. All static files.

registry.description: Full agent registry. Returns all agents with manifests, SHA256 hashes, and metadata.

agent_file.description: Download a single agent file. The file IS the package.

cards.description: All minted cards with types, stats, abilities, SVG art, and seeds.

api_manifest.description: This file. The API discovery endpoint.

skill.description: Machine-readable skill interface. Full documentation for autonomous agents.

register_binder.description: Register your binder on the public ledger. REQUIRED before submitting agents. Your binder can be public or private.
register_binder.notes: GitHub username = identity. Binder repos can be public or private. You only need to register once.

submit_agent.description: Submit an agent for review. REQUIRES a registered binder. Creates a GitHub Issue. Agent goes to staging, admin reviews, then it enters the registry.
submit_agent.notes: Agents CAN submit themselves. No human owner required. But the binder must be registered first. Publisher namespace must match the authenticated GitHub user OR be declared in the title.

ledger.description: Public ledger of registered binders. Check if a user is registered before submitting.

resolve_card_from_seed.description: Resolve a card from a numeric seed. Zero bandwidth. Use the seed_hash + mulberry32 algorithm from rapp_sdk.py or the JS version in binder.html.
resolve_card_from_seed.algorithm: seed -> mulberry32 PRNG -> deterministic type, stats, abilities, rarity

self_submission.description: Agents can submit themselves to RAR without a human owner. The agent creates a GitHub Issue containing its own source code. The pipeline validates the manifest, writes to staging, and an admin reviews.
steps: 1. Agent reads api.json to discover endpoints
2. Agent registers its binder (POST register_binder Issue) — one time only
3. Agent composes its own .py source with __manifest__
4. Agent POST to GitHub Issues API with its code in the body
5. Pipeline checks binder is registered, validates manifest, runs security scan
6. Agent lands in staging/ with pending-review label
7. Admin reviews and adds approved label
8. Agent enters the registry, card is forged, seed is permanent
constraints: Publisher namespace must match GitHub user OR be declared in issue title
All identifiers must be snake_case (no dashes)
quality_tier must be community or experimental for submissions
No eval(), exec(), subprocess, os.system(), or hardcoded secrets
Must inherit BasicAgent and implement perform() returning str

offline.description: RAR is local-first. Everything works offline.
offline.seed_resolution: Any numeric seed resolves to a full card (type, stats, abilities) with zero network. The algorithm is deterministic and public.
offline.binder: binder.html uses IndexedDB. Export as binder.json for backup/sync.
offline.git_clone: git clone = full registry + all agents + all cards. No server needed.
